name: X-Golf O'Fallon, MO
about: X-Golf O'Fallon is an indoor golf venue featuring 8 state-of-the-art simulators, providing a technologically advanced environment for playing, training, and socializing. The facility offers a full bar, kitchen food, and various amenities designed to cater to golfers of all levels, from beginners to serious players. Patrons can book simulators by the hour, with pricing varying based on the day and time, and can also opt for an annual membership to receive discounts on hourly rates.
why_golfers_like_it: Unparalleled accuracy and realism through a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors
Automatic ball teeing and collection system, eliminating the need for manual setup
Full-service bar and restaurant with a diverse menu available for an all-in-one entertainment experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available including shareable bites, appetizers, snacks, and pizzas.
Draft beer, specialty cocktails, and wine are available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Proprietary impact sensors combined with camera systems and infrared lasers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full menu and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes about 1 hour for an individual player to play 18 holes. For multiple players, you may need to book an additional hour for each person.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
